_doc: Anchor for experiment-hygiene smoke tests, calibrated for model label 'sft_v2'. Captured from a live run of the harness (configure_lm + FormAssistant + build_context) at calibration time. Future experiments must reproduce this output to be trusted. See CLAUDE.md > Experiment hygiene.
